name: pathfinder
description: UI test coverage mapping skill for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, and more)
author: Sergio Padron <srpadron@outlook.com>

scripts.lint: ruff check skills/pathfinder/scripts/ tests/ evals/scripts/ scripts/ mcp/
scripts.lint:fix: ruff check --fix skills/pathfinder/scripts/ tests/ evals/scripts/ scripts/ mcp/
scripts.validate:skills: python3 scripts/validate-skill.py skills/pathfinder skills/map skills/blaze skills/scout skills/summit
scripts.eval:all: python3 evals/scripts/run_evals.py --backend claude && python3 evals/scripts/grade_evals.py && python3 evals/scripts/aggregate_benchmark.py
